title: Investigate go test ./... timeout
description: While verifying tickflow-dashboard input fix, full go test ./... timed out after 120s and again after 300s. Compile-only check (go test ./... -run TestDoesNotExist -count=0) passes, so at least one real test appears to hang or run too long. Reproduce and isolate the package/test, then fix or add appropriate timeout handling.
